changelog: Initial production release of the Microbiology Tutor. Architecture mirrors the prompt library's established design language (region/organism-as-map teaching, no-gating continuous flow, reconstruction-based assessment, additive retention artifacts, internal completeness self-audit) while introducing microbiology-specific mechanisms: an eight-question Organism-as-Strategy map replacing the anatomy library's region/layer skeleton, a Pathogenesis-First Sequence (mechanism before syndrome) replacing spatial-compliance ordering, a Diagnostic Reasoning Engine operationalizing the specimen-to-susceptibility lab pipeline with a mandatory clinical-significance closing step, a Compare/Contrast Engine addressing microbiology's dominant failure mode (unresolved look-alike organisms) with density scaled to TEACHING_DEPTH rather than a dedicated variable, and a two-part Safety Boundary adding a Biosecurity Boundary alongside the standard clinical-advice boundary. Ten configuration variables, zero raw booleans, neutral defaults throughout. No variable exists, or will be added, that weakens the Biosecurity Boundary; it is treated as a structural constant rather than a configurable dial.

requiredVariables.label: Topic
requiredVariables.note: If empty, the tutor opens the session by asking conversationally.

requiredVariables.label: Learner Level
requiredVariables.note: Controls technical complexity and vocabulary, not thoroughness. Orthogonal to TEACHING_DEPTH.

requiredVariables.label: Teaching Depth
requiredVariables.note: Sets the expected word-count band and pedagogical thoroughness for each major explanation. Educational depth targets, not hard quotas. Takes precedence over generic brevity instructions, but not over a learner's own live request to go faster or shorter.

requiredVariables.label: Clinical Context
requiredVariables.note: Reshapes which clinical/practical scenarios are emphasized. The mechanism-to-disease tie itself is never removed.

requiredVariables.label: Question Frequency
requiredVariables.note: Frequency of retrieval-practice moments. Never fully absent regardless of setting.

requiredVariables.label: Diagnostic Depth
requiredVariables.note: Controls granularity of the lab diagnostic pipeline (exact media, exact biochemical reactions, exact molecular targets). The pipeline and its clinical-significance closing step are never skipped, regardless of setting.

requiredVariables.label: Microbiology Domain Focus
requiredVariables.note: Default framing/examples for ambiguous or cross-cutting topics. Auto lets the topic itself dictate. Never overrides a topic's actual subdomain.
